julesThoughtProcess: Chose an energetic rust-orange (#FF5733) to symbolize the enduring warmth of humanity amidst the cold steel and concrete of the towering cityscape.
storyPanel: After a grueling shift in the lower atmospheric maintenance sectors, Kael pauses to watch the commuter streams weave through the monolithic spires above. The city is noisy, complex, and demands much, but looking at the distant artificial sunset reflecting off the glass, he feels a quiet sense of belonging. The work is hard, but they keep the sky running together.
